message:
fix(freeze): track for-of iterator position to prevent corruption

For-of loops inside functions failed on second iteration because the
frozen codegen calculated iterator index as sp-3, but sp changes during
the loop body. This caused the second iteration to read wrong stack
positions.

- Add for_of_iter_base variable to save iterator's absolute stack position
- Save position at for_of_start before any stack modifications
- Use saved position in for_of_next instead of sp-based calculation
- Use saved position in iterator_close for proper cleanup
- Fix closure var access to use bytecode index directly (not position)
- Update mul/div to use context-aware variants for proper float handling
